title: Machine CLI option for disabling Rosetta
body:
### Feature request description

By default, the podman machine VM booted with Rosetta support. The underlying virtualization implementation supports disabling this, but there is no option under `podman machine` to control this.

Podman Desktop can control the setting. It writes to `~/.config/containers/containers.conf`:

```toml
[machine]
rosetta = false
```

### Suggest potential solution

I suggest exposing `podman machine set --rosetta=true|false`.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
